title: Add hyperparameter profile for RunPod A100 (80GB VRAM)
completion_summary: trainer/profiles/profile_a100.yaml: batch_size 16 + grad_accum 1 (effective batch 16; trivially bumped to 32 if SM util drops below 50%), load_in_4bit FALSE (16-bit LoRA on the unquantized base trains faster at this VRAM tier; Qwen2.5-1.5B in bf16 fits with headroom), base_model swaps to unsloth/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct (non-prequantized), lr 3e-4 (linear-scaling-rule bump for the larger effective batch), warmup 10, max_steps 200, seed 3407. Acceptance bullets covered: batch 16-32 ✓, LoRA 16-bit (load_in_4bit: false) ✓, configurable via the same --profile + CLI override pipeline trainer-02 added ✓. The <10 min wall-clock criterion is testable only on a real A100 -- defers to the trainer-05 burst dispatcher run. Deliverables: trainer/profiles/profile_a100.yaml; loader integration shared with trainer-02.
acceptance_criteria: Training completes in < 10 min on A100
Profile is configurable via CLI or config file
